frase_original: Tennis is mostly mental. Of course, you must have a lot of physical skill, but you can't play tennis well and not be a good thinker. You win or lose the match before you even go out there.

texto: It wasn't like I was self-motivated. My dad started me. It was his dream before it was mine.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Venus Williams: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “It wasn't like I was self-motivated. My dad started me. It was his dream before it was mine.” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, dream, me pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de me e started.
